Here is what is moving markets today.
• A new UK-India trade deal aims to shake up goods from Scotch to towels
• US inflation dipped thanks to gas, but Mideast tensions create risk
• De Beers is pausing a major South African mine as diamond demand drops HEADLINNE.com #Finance

Here is what is happening in the world.
• A Singapore court fined Bloomberg for defaming two ministers
